applyTo: '**'

# Go Clean Architecture Guidelines

## Project Structure
- Follow Clean Architecture principles with clear separation of concerns
- Organize code into layers: `models`, `repositories`, `services`, `handlers`

## Model Conventions
- All models MUST include: ID (int), CreatedAt (time.Time), UpdatedAt (time.Time)
- Use snake_case for JSON tags




## Testing Requirements

-agents should always show testing commands to test after code generation.
